---
title: "Epic Lifecycle / Portfolio Kanban"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML

_candidates = [Path("data/epic-lifecycle.json"), Path("../data/epic-lifecycle.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/epic-lifecycle.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report epic-lifecycle"
    )

d      = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group  = d["group"]
states = d["states"]
stuck  = d["stuck"]
unlab  = d["unlabelled"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<blockquote>The SAFe Portfolio Kanban tracks where epics are in their approval-to-delivery
lifecycle. Use this report to identify bottlenecks in the funding and approval pipeline.
Epics stuck in <strong>Analyzing</strong> or <strong>Portfolio Backlog</strong> signal
decision-making delays that block downstream delivery.</blockquote>
""")
```

## Portfolio Kanban — Current State

```{python}
html = '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr>'
html += "<th>State</th><th>Count</th><th>Avg Age</th><th>Oldest</th><th>Threshold</th>"
html += "</tr></thead><tbody>"
for s in states:
    count_cell = f'<a href="{s["url"]}" target="_blank">{s["count"]}</a>' if s["count"] and s["url"] else str(s["count"])
    avg_str   = f'{s["avg_age"]}d' if s["avg_age"] is not None else "—"
    old_str   = f'{s["max_age"]}d {"⚠️" if s["over_threshold"] else ""}' if s["max_age"] is not None else "—"
    thresh_str = f'{s["threshold"]}d' if s["threshold"] else "—"
    html += f"<tr><td>{s['label']}</td><td>{count_cell}</td><td>{avg_str}</td><td>{old_str}</td><td>{thresh_str}</td></tr>"
unlab_count = len(unlab)
html += f"<tr><td><em>(unlabelled)</em></td><td>{unlab_count}</td><td>—</td><td>—</td><td>—</td></tr>"
html += "</tbody></table>"
HTML(html)
```

## ⚠️ Stuck Items

```{python}
if not stuck:
    HTML("<p>✅ No epics have exceeded their state thresholds. Kanban is flowing.</p>")
else:
    html = ""
    for section in stuck:
        html += f"<h3>⚠️ {section['label']} (&gt; {section['threshold']} days)</h3>"
        html += f"<p><em>{section['guidance']}</em></p>"
        html += '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr><th>Epic</th><th>Type</th><th>Age</th><th>PI</th><th>Group</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
        for e in section["epics"]:
            link = f'<a href="{e["url"]}" target="_blank">{e["title"]}</a>' if e["url"] else e["title"]
            html += f"<tr><td>{link}</td><td>{e['icon']} {e['type']}</td><td><strong>{e['age']}d</strong></td><td>{e['piid']}</td><td>{e['group']}</td></tr>"
        html += "</tbody></table>"
    HTML(html)
```

## Kanban Detail — By State

```{python}
html = ""
for s in states:
    html += f"<h3>{s['label']}</h3><p><em>{s['description']}</em></p>"
    if not s["epics"]:
        html += "<p>No epics in this state.</p>"
        continue
    html += '<table class="table table-sm table-striped"><thead><tr><th>Epic</th><th>Type</th><th>Age</th><th>PI</th><th>Group</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
    for e in s["epics"]:
        link    = f'<a href="{e["url"]}" target="_blank">{e["title"]}</a>' if e["url"] else e["title"]
        age_str = f'<strong>{e["age"]}d</strong> ⚠️' if e["stuck"] else (f'{e["age"]}d' if e["age"] is not None else "—")
        html += f"<tr><td>{link}</td><td>{e['icon']} {e['type']}</td><td>{age_str}</td><td>{e['piid']}</td><td>{e['group']}</td></tr>"
    html += "</tbody></table>"

if unlab:
    html += "<h3><em>(Unlabelled)</em></h3>"
    html += "<p><em>Epics without a <code>lifecycle::</code> label. Apply a lifecycle label or use <code>set-lifecycle-labels</code> to assign in bulk.</em></p>"
    html += '<table class="table table-sm table-striped"><thead><tr><th>Epic</th><th>Type</th><th>Age</th><th>PI</th><th>Group</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
    for e in unlab:
        link = f'<a href="{e["url"]}" target="_blank">{e["title"]}</a>' if e["url"] else e["title"]
        html += f"<tr><td>{link}</td><td>{e['icon']} {e['type']}</td><td>{e['age'] or '—'}</td><td>{e['piid']}</td><td>{e['group']}</td></tr>"
    html += "</tbody></table>"

HTML(html)
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## SAFe Portfolio Kanban States

| State | Label | Meaning | Flag if > |
|-------|-------|---------|-----------|
| 💡 Funnel | `lifecycle::funnel` | Ideas submitted, not yet analyzed | 90 days |
| 🔍 Analyzing | `lifecycle::analyzing` | Lean Business Case in development | 30 days |
| 📋 Portfolio Backlog | `lifecycle::backlog` | Approved, awaiting capacity | 60 days |
| ⚙️ Implementing | `lifecycle::implementing` | Active in a Program Increment | — |
| ✅ Done | `lifecycle::done` | Delivered | — |
:::
